description: Live run-tool E2E tool list for the Particles extension. Driven by tests/e2e/run_tool_e2e.py from the e2e-godot CI leg against a connected headless editor + a local gamedev-mcp-server. Each entry is one real assertion: a regression in the tool turns the CI leg red.
notes: The four editor tools (create/get/configure/set-emitting) resolve nodes relative to the edited scene root, so the 'setup' phase opens a scene first via the core godot_mcp 'scene-create' tool. particles-defaults is pure-managed and needs no scene. The 'expect' substrings are matched against godot-cli's compact --raw JSON.
